codeReview.summary: The costing follow-up narrows dispatch valuation to the reserved finished-good batch when that batch is known, preventing shipment-time reblending under weighted-average defaults and keeping profitability/reporting aligned with the same batch truth. The reviewed valuation/service changes and expanded regression coverage substantiate the intended batch-actual plus packaging carry-forward behavior without showing a defect in the touched dispatch, reporting, or profitability paths.

summary: Pass. Reserved batch cost now carries through dispatch, COGS, and profitability-facing outputs instead of being recomputed from weighted average when concrete batch truth already exists.
